remarks: The moment you step onto the inviting front porch, you'll feel the warmth and charm of this exceptional 5-bedroom, 4.5-bath Colonial perched on a quiet cul-de-sac. Experience sophisticated design, unparalleled comfort, and an unbeatable location. Welcome to your dream home in Darien. The heart of the home is the chef's kitchen, fully renovated and featuring top-of-the-line appliances, a leathered black quartz island, and space for everyone to gather. Flowing through french doors to the spacious family room, adorned with custom built-ins and the sun-drenched playroom that opens to the professionally landscaped backyard and terrace-your private oasis for outdoor living. Upstairs, the luxurious primary suite is a true retreat, boasting a cozy fireplace, an expansive walk-in closet, and a spa-inspired bathroom with a double vanity, oversized shower, and a classic clawfoot tub. The additional 4 bedrooms all gift generous size, oversized closets and 3 more fully renovated bathrooms. The great room wows with size and soaring exposed beams, a striking stone fireplace. A fun, warm and inviting spacee for all to enjoy. Don't forget the basement with finished space, workout area and a hockey shooting room. Situated just minutes from school, the train, parks, downtown shops, and acclaimed restaurants, this property offers luxury living along with convenience and a true sense of community.
